description_long: This armchair features a classic, ornate design with a high, winged backrest and wide, rolled armrests. The upholstery is a soft blue fabric adorned with an elegant white floral damask pattern, giving it a vintage and luxurious appearance. The frame and armrest edges are crafted from light-colored wood, smoothly curved and polished, adding a touch of sophistication. The seat and back cushions are thick and plush, providing ample comfort and support. The base of the chair is fully upholstered, with no visible legs except for small, curved wooden feet at the front. This armchair would be a striking and comfortable addition to a park, sidewalk lounge, or urban waiting area.
description: A vintage-style armchair with blue floral upholstery, plush cushions, and curved wooden accents. The high winged back and rolled armrests create a luxurious and inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, thick cushions, ornate wooden armrests, and high winged backrest with floral upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the deep seat, thick cushioning, and the smooth curve of the wooden frame along the armrest and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered back with subtle texture and the continuous wooden trim along the top edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the armrest's curve and the plushness of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_armrest_design: curved wooden frame with padded and upholstered tops
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged with plush cushioning and ornate wooden trim
attribute_leg_type: short, curved wooden feet partially visible at the front
attribute_upholstery_pattern: blue fabric with white floral damask print
